title: Category Search Results
description: Schema for e-commerce category browsing or search results pages.

result_item.description: An individual product in the search or category results.

is_sponsored.description: Whether this result is a sponsored/paid placement.

platform.description: E-commerce platform (e.g., Amazon, Walmart). Commonly found in: site domain, platform branding, page header.

query_or_category.description: Search query string or category name browsed. Commonly found in: search bar value, page title, breadcrumb current page, URL parameter.

page_number.description: Current page number in paginated results. Commonly found in: pagination control, URL page parameter, page indicator.

total_results.description: Total number of results returned. Commonly found in: results count display, total items label, search results header.

results.description: List of product results on this page. Commonly found in: product grid, search results list, category product cards.

filters_applied.description: Active filters applied to the results. Commonly found in: active filter chips, selected filter labels, URL filter parameters.

sort_by.description: Current sort order applied to results. Commonly found in: sort by dropdown selected, sort parameter in URL, results sort label.

ads_count.description: Number of sponsored/ad placements in results. Commonly found in: sponsored label count, ad badge count in results.

snapshot_date.description: Date this search results snapshot was captured. Commonly found in: extraction date, scraper timestamp, page capture date.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
